item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 040600Z AUTO VRB02KT 9999 OVC013 14/14 Q1011 TEMPO BKN004
🟡 TAF LFOT 040500Z 0406/0506 VRB02KT 9999 BKN020 TEMPO 0406/0410 SCT004 BKN008 PROB40 TEMPO 0406/0408 BKN004 TEMPO 0411/0420 4000 -SHRA BKN030TCU PROB30 TEMPO 0413/0418 2000 TSRA BKN020CB BECMG 0417/0419 02005KT PROB30 TEMPO 0421/0424 4000 -SHRA BKN030TCU PROB30 TEMPO 0500/0503 4000 -RA PROB40 TEMPO 0503/0506 4000 -RA BKN004
